aljazeera.title: Iran holds funerals for children killed in Minab school strike

monitor_the_situation.title: — S4 · Conflict · Bushehr, Iran · 35m ago. Multiple US airstrikes targeted the city of Bushehr in southern Iran. Casualties and damage not yet confirmed.
American B-1 Bombers Head to Iran to Strike Missile Cities
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 5h ago. US B-1 bombers are en route to Iran for airstrikes on missile-related targets, the first such mission since the 40-day war.
